translations.- ### Tour Guide Self-Introduction (Ishi:
- ### Tour Guide Self-Introduction (Ishinan) - Chinese, English, Japanese

  **Chinese:**  
  大家好，我是石楠，這次很高興能成為大家的導遊。希望能帶給大家愉快又難忘的旅程。

  **English:**  
  Hello everyone, I am Ishinan. I am very happy to be your tour guide this time. I hope to bring you a pleasant and memorable trip.

  **Japanese:**  
  皆さん、こんにちは。私は石楠です。今回、皆さんのガイドを務めることができてとても嬉しいです。楽しくて忘れられない旅にしたいと思います。

- Itinerary introduction: The guide mentioned that the Takachiho day tour is the longest and most challenging among all full-day tour options XD

- There is WiFi on the bus (but it is not very stable)

- **Always fasten your seatbelt ⚠️**

- Most participants are Taiwanese.

- Introduction to Takachiho Shrine and inquiry about boat reservation availability

- It takes about 3 hours to reach the first stop, Takachiho Shrine.
translations.- **At JR stations without any electroni:
- **At JR stations without electronic boards, check the timetable on the platform notice board to confirm the train’s stopping platform.** ⚠️

- **At small JR stations without a stationmaster, to get off you must go to the first car (the conductor also acts as the stationmaster, similar to getting off a bus).**

- JR Limited Express tickets are separate from regular tickets. After buying a regular ticket, you need to purchase a Limited Express ticket to ride the Limited Express train; boarding without it requires a fare adjustment. (With a JR Pass, you don’t need to worry and can board freely.)

- JR Limited Express trains almost always have ticket inspections. If you take an unreserved seat, the conductor will usually ask your destination for record-keeping.

- **If you book the JR Pass online in advance (credit card payment required for seat reservation fee), you must present the same credit card used for payment when exchanging the JR Pass in Japan. So be sure to bring that card with you.** ⚠️

- If you book the New Camellia cruise too late, only economy dormitory beds are available (8–11 people, mixed gender, Japanese-style public bath only, lights out at 11 PM).

- Yufuin no Mori was fully booked due to late reservation, so I had to take the regular Yufu JR train.

- Booking ahead is required for boating at Takachiho Gorge.

- Two Shinkansen trains are not covered by the JR Pass: **“Nozomi” and “Mizuho”**; tickets must be purchased separately.

- The JR Pass entry and exit gates for the Shinkansen at Hakata Station sometimes get stuck and require manual assistance (since the two mentioned trains are not allowed, as long as you confirm you are not taking those trains, the staff will let you through).

- **Always double-check your bookings. This time, there was a gender error when booking the New Camellia ferry, so I quickly contacted customer service to fix it on the day.** ⚠️  
  **(Later found out mixed-gender accommodation was probably fine, but it was still quite a shock.)**

- Buses in Kyushu are not always on time, and Google Maps directions may not always be accurate.

- [Japan Luggage Storage Coin Lockers Inquiry and Reservation](https://cloak.ecbo.io/zh-TW){:target="_blank"} ( **But not all locations are listed; many places with storage are not shown** )

- Adapter needed for Korea.

- Korean won can only be exchanged at the counter.

- In Korea, you can just buy a Tmoney transportation card without needing a Wowpass.
translations.- **Hakata Port does NOT support electro:
- **Hakata Port does NOT support electronic customs clearance, so be sure to fill out the arrival card and customs declaration form ⚠️**

- You can bring food and water, and you don’t need to put them in your suitcase since there’s no need to check in luggage. Your suitcase goes on board with you.

- Holding drinks only is not allowed.

- The entire departure process was very quick, and the security check was just a formality (everything went through the X-ray).

translations.`由布院之森` 已滿，只能預約一般列車 `由布 1` ，最早的班次 07:43: `Yufuin no Mori` is fully booked, so only the regular train `Yufu 1` can be reserved. The earliest departure is at 07:43, arriving at 10:03.
translations.一出來就有公車往博多站或天神地區。\n\n: Right outside, there are buses going to Hakata Station or the Tenjin area.
translations.一早 Check-out 拖著行李前往 JR 博多站搭 `由布 1` 前往由布院: Early in the morning, check out and drag your luggage to JR Hakata Station to take the `Yufu 1` bound for Yufuin.
translations.一早從釜山站公車站搭乘 `1001` 公車前往海東龍宮寺；班次多、人不多。\n\: Early in the morning, take bus `1001` from Busan Station bus stop to Haedong Yonggungsa Temple; frequent departures and not crowded.
translations.一早換完飯店後搭乘 JR 到九大學研都市站。\n\n: After checking out of the hotel early in the morning, I took the JR train to Kyudai-Gakken-Toshi Station.
translations.一杯咖啡醒醒腦\n: A cup of coffee to wake up the mind
translations.一樓超市有一台西鐵公車改裝的飲料櫃，很酷ＸＤ。\n\n: On the first-floor supermarket, there is a drink cooler made from a Nishitetsu bus, which is really cool XD.
translations.一樣出來就能看到往鬼山地獄的招牌。\n\n: As soon as you exit, you can see the signboard pointing to Oniyama Hell.
translations.一樣把總結此行學到的事寫在前面，「自由行就是不斷地繳學費(花時間或金錢)學習，經: Summarize the lesson learned at the beginning: "Independent travel means constantly paying the tuition (in time or money) to learn. With more experience, you will encounter fewer pitfalls."
translations.一樣是靠卡感應讀取內容\n: It also relies on card contactless reading.
translations.一樣有一堆韓式小菜，都是醃漬物、泡菜、生醃螃蟹(應該是生吃但很腥，我不敢)\n: There were also many Korean side dishes, mostly pickled items, kimchi, and marinated raw crab (which is supposed to be eaten raw but smells too fishy for me).
translations.一航 BR 航站樓需轉乘交通車到登機口，往釜山這個航班沒什麼人啊！如圖，目測不到: Terminal BR requires a shuttle bus transfer to the boarding gate. There are very few passengers on the flight to Busan! As shown in the picture, it looks like fewer than 30 people.
translations.一路下坡到海東龍宮寺本院，整排樓梯要小心走。\n\n: It's a downhill walk to the main hall of Haedong Yonggungsa Temple. Be careful on the long flight of stairs.
translations.一路徒步海岸到唐戶市場。\n\n: Walked along the coast all the way to Karato Market.
translations.一路晃晃悠悠，走回車站市場覓食，大分的公車很有年代感，但維持得很好。\n\n: Strolling leisurely back to the station market to find food, the buses in Oita have a vintage feel but are well maintained.
translations.一路穿過整排鳥居、美麗盛開的繡球花，後面可以在登山往上到奧之院(約 200M，很: Passing through a row of torii gates and beautiful blooming hydrangeas, you can continue hiking up to the inner shrine (about 200 meters, very steep and difficult to walk).
translations.一路走到底(約 15 分鐘)，就是神社。\n\n: Walk straight ahead (about 15 minutes), and you'll reach the shrine.
translations.一路遇到亂流很顛波，搖搖晃晃順利降落台灣，時間延誤了快 30 分鐘，接近 23: The flight experienced turbulence and was quite bumpy. We landed safely in Taiwan about 30 minutes late, arriving close to 11 PM (scheduled time was 10:25 PM).
translations.上次來吃過一次 鐵鍋煎餃 鉄なべ 還懷念那脆脆煎餃味道。\n\n: Last time I tried the iron pan fried dumplings at 鉄なべ and still miss the crispy taste of those dumplings.
translations.上次去 [廣島](../31b9b3a63abc/) 的入住東橫 INN 的時候: Last time I stayed at [Toyoko INN in Hiroshima](../31b9b3a63abc/), I signed up for their membership. Just tell the front desk you want to join when you check in, fill out a simple form, [pay a one-time membership fee of 1,500 yen](https://www.toyoko-inn.com/club/?lcl_id=zh_TW){:target="_blank"}, get your photo taken, and receive your card on the spot. You can use it from then on.
translations.上次去長崎經武雄溫泉換車，對這站沒什麼印象，後來有追蹤 [武雄市的觀光 IG](: Last time when I traveled to Nagasaki, I transferred at Takeo Onsen Station and didn’t have much impression of the place. Later, I followed [Takeo City Tourism IG](https://www.instagram.com/takeokankou/){:target="_blank"} (the official account regularly hosts events, like free firefly shuttle rides. If you plan to stay at Takeo Onsen, it’s worth following). This time, since I was passing by and had some time, I decided to check it out.
translations.下午回到天神周邊、天神地下街、Le Labo、岩田屋百貨、三井百貨…等等(天神這: In the afternoon, return to the Tenjin area, Tenjin Underground Shopping Mall, Le Labo, Iwataya Department Store, Mitsukoshi Department Store, and more (there are many department stores around Tenjin).
translations.下車往前走就能看到海東龍宮寺的指標了，右轉走一段山坡路就能抵達；地圖寫走 15: After getting off, walk straight ahead and you will see the sign for Haedong Yonggungsa Temple. Turn right and walk up a hill to reach it; the map says 15 minutes, but since it's uphill, it takes about 30 minutes. If you don't want to walk, you can also take a taxi.
translations.下車後就是 櫻井二見浦 夫婦岩。\n\n: After getting off the bus, you will arrive at Sakurai Futamigaura, the Meoto Iwa (Married Couple Rocks).
translations.下車後往前走一點就是保當棧橋，一路往後走就是唐津城；看到這個前橋後城的景色，這一: After getting off, walk a bit forward to reach Budou Pier. Continue walking back along the path to find Karatsu Castle; seeing this front bridge and rear castle view makes all the travel worthwhile.
translations.下車點對面就是 [Skyline Luge 釜山](https://lizzzs: Right across from the drop-off point is [Skyline Luge Busan](https://lizzzstyle.tw/%E9%87%9C%E5%B1%B1%E6%96%9C%E5%9D%A1%E6%BB%91%E8%BB%8A/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.下遊覽車後走約 5 分鐘到 天岩戶神社西本宮，商店街商家門口會懸掛不同的神面具。: After getting off the tour bus, walk about 5 minutes to Ama-no-Iwato Shrine West Main Shrine. Different divine masks are hung at the entrances of shops along the shopping street.
translations.下階梯要小心，親眼目睹一個韓國大叔踩空摔倒到沙堆中(還好是沙堆)。\n\n: Be careful when going down the stairs. I witnessed a Korean man miss a step and fall into a sand pile (luckily it was sand).
translations.不的不佩服日本的職業運動風氣，平日、晚上 18:00 球場座位約 40,000: I can't help but admire the professional sports culture in Japan. On weekdays at 6:00 PM, the stadium with about 40,000 seats is almost full. When choosing seats, there are no entire empty rows or spots at the edges or corners.
translations.不知不覺出國 11 天了，已開始想念台灣的美食，晚上 21:00 的飛機還有很多: Unknowingly, it's been 11 days abroad, and I’ve started to miss Taiwan's delicious food. With a 9:00 PM flight, there’s still plenty of time to wander around.
translations.不知道是不是因為平日表參道、商店街幾乎沒人也沒幾家有開。\n\n: I’m not sure if it’s because it’s a weekday, but Omotesando and the shopping streets were almost empty, with very few stores open.
translations.中間停靠站會有一些人上車，人不多，所以還好\n: Some passengers board at the intermediate stops, but since the number is small, it's still manageable.
translations.主要是來三樓 ガチャガチャの森 跟一樓手扶梯下的 Pon! 看有沒有我要找的扭蛋: Mainly came to the third floor ガチャガチャの森 and the Pon! area under the first-floor escalator to see if there were any gacha capsules I was looking for. (None)
translations.主要是去他 B1 的超大扭蛋百貨。\n\n: Mainly went to his huge capsule toy department store in B1.
translations.主要是日本通勤族，過了唐津市區後車上就只剩我一人了，我要坐到最底站 — **寶當: The train was mainly filled with Japanese commuters. After passing Karatsu city, I was the only passenger left on board. I was going all the way to the last stop — **Bodou Pier.**
translations.主要的伴手禮都買好、裝好行李了，今天就純粹亂逛找電車發車這個扭蛋。(最終沒找到，: Most of the main souvenirs have been bought and packed. Today is just a casual stroll to find the tram gacha. (In the end, none were found. According to the [stores provided by the manufacturer](https://toyscabin.com/shoplist/){:target="_blank"}, all in the city are sold out.)
translations.九州公車不一定準時、Google Map 指示也不一定準確\n: Buses in Kyushu are not always on time, and Google Maps directions may not always be accurate.
translations.九州景點行程差不多告一段落了，剩下接近兩天的逛街購物行程。\n\n: The sightseeing itinerary in Kyushu is almost complete, leaving nearly two days for shopping and strolling.
translations.介紹高千穗神社、調查有無人有預約划船\n: Introduction to Takachiho Shrine and Inquiry About Boat Reservation Availability
translations.以上，請參考 [**2023 九州 10 日自由行獨旅**](../d78e0b: For more details, please refer to [**2023 Kyushu 10-Day Solo Trip**](../d78e0b15a08a/).
translations.休息一下之後重新出門，16:30 抵達博多運河城。\n\n: After a short break, head out again and arrive at Canal City Hakata at 16:30.
translations.休息完慢慢走回參拜天岩戶神社。\n\n: After resting, slowly walk back to visit Amano Iwato Shrine.
translations.但灶地獄的特色不是泉湧，是煙霧，工作人員會拿線香跟吹風，對著溫泉的蒸氣吹就會冒出: But the unique feature of the Cooking Pot Hell is not the spring itself, but the smoke. Staff use incense sticks and blow air onto the hot spring steam, which produces a large amount of smoke. It's quite interesting (according to explanations, the incense particles attract more water vapor molecules, causing the smoke to gather).
translations.來回含托運(23公斤/件)\n: Round trip including checked baggage (23 kg per piece)
translations.來打平台後就能看到臥佛本尊，腳底有經文，整體很壯觀莊重。\n\n: After climbing onto the platform, you can see the reclining Buddha statue. There are scriptures on the soles of its feet, making the whole scene very grand and solemn.
translations.價格： `經濟/2等室:共乘艙` NT$1,450/人\n\n: Price: `Economy/2nd Class Cabin: Shared Cabin` NT$1,450 per person
translations.先來先到，剛好卡到角落位置，稍微大一點\n: First come, first served. Luckily got a corner seat, which is slightly bigger.
translations.先去武雄神社，路上會經過塚崎大楠樹，一個小景點。\n\n: First, go to Takeo Shrine. On the way, you will pass Tsukazaki Giant Camphor Tree, a small scenic spot.
translations.先去血池地獄，同海地獄的小血池，只是規模更大。\n\n: First, visit the Blood Pond Hell, which is similar to the Small Blood Pond at Sea Hell but on a larger scale.
translations.先去飯店寄放行李，東橫 INN 格局都差不多，剛好排到跟昨天博多站前一模一樣格局: First, go to the hotel to drop off luggage. The layout of Toyoko INN hotels is quite similar. This time, I got a room with the exact same layout and angle as the one in front of Hakata Station yesterday. The difference is that this hotel's bathroom is larger, but the hallway is narrower.
translations.先從大分到小倉再去門司港、下關， **下關和唐津距離約 140 公里，正常人是不: First, from Oita to Kokura, then to Mojiko and Shimonoseki. **Shimonoseki and Karatsu are about 140 km apart, and normally people wouldn’t plan a trip like this**; since I took the wrong train on the first day in Japan and missed Karatsu, I really wanted to visit this spot, so I forced myself into a march-like one-day trip from Shimonoseki to Karatsu.
translations.入口處對面的山綠油油的很美。\n\n: The mountain opposite the entrance is lush and green, very beautiful.
translations.入場只需撕掉門票一角投入箱子即可\n: To enter, simply tear off a corner of the ticket and drop it into the box.
translations.全長 780 公尺，一路直直到底，走到中間會有一條分界線。\n\n: The total length is 780 meters, going straight all the way. There is a dividing line in the middle.
translations.兩份湯飯＋豬頸肉一盤 一共 46,000 韓幣。\n: Two servings of soup rice plus one plate of pork neck meat, total 46,000 KRW.
translations.公共空間不會熄燈\n: Public areas will not have the lights turned off
translations.公車站一樣排滿人，跟上次一樣跟著人群走路回到地鐵唐人町站。(約 15 分鐘)\n: The bus stop was also crowded with people. Just like last time, I followed the crowd and walked back to the Tojinmachi subway station. (About 15 minutes)
translations.再回到一樓買如水庵的草莓大福解膩。\n\n: Then go back to the first floor to buy Rusuian's strawberry daifuku to refresh your palate.
translations.再往前走就能看到海東龍宮寺的牌樓，色彩非常豐富有特色。\n\n: If you walk further ahead, you will see the gate of Haedong Yonggungsa Temple, which is very colorful and distinctive.
translations.再換車的時候出錯了，這是小站無任何電子看板，一下車看到月台寫「唐津方面」就以為在: I made a mistake when transferring trains. This was a small station with no electronic boards. After getting off, I saw the platform labeled "Towards Karatsu" and thought I should transfer there. However, when the train arrived, it passed on another platform, and I missed getting on.
translations.再見九州、再見日本，飛機餐是薑味豬肉炒麵，不怎麼樣，但水果有哈密瓜！\n\n: Goodbye Kyushu, goodbye Japan. The airplane meal was ginger pork fried noodles, not very good, but the fruit included cantaloupe!
translations.出 JR 轉搭公車前往別府地獄 — 第一個，海地獄，順序可參考上圖行程。\n\n: Exit JR and transfer to the bus heading to Beppu Jigoku — the first stop is Umi Jigoku. You can follow the route shown in the above itinerary.
translations.出佐世保站之後過馬路到對面再往後面走找到 6 號站牌，往「九十九島水族館」。\n: After exiting Sasebo Station, cross the street to the opposite side, then walk further back to find bus stop No. 6, heading to "Kujukushima Aquarium."
translations.出來同樣有指示牌往下一個地獄。\n\n: After exiting, there are also signboards directing you to the next hell.
translations.出來照指示往下走就是白池地獄。\n\n: Exit and follow the instructions to go down to Shiraike Jigoku.
translations.出境後候船空間不大，有幾家免稅店跟咖啡廳(只有這家有賣吃的)，買了一個鮪魚三明治: The waiting area after immigration is small, with a few duty-free shops and cafes (only this one sells food). I bought a tuna sandwich to satisfy my hunger.
translations.出境後可以先用行李排隊，大家也都是用行李箱排好隊，準備搭船。\n\n: After exiting, you can line up with your luggage. Everyone queues up with their suitcases, ready to board the ship.
translations.出海地獄之後跟著指示走就能走到下一個鬼石坊主地獄。\n\n: After visiting the Sea Hell, just follow the signs to reach the next Oniishibozu Hell.
translations.出發：18:30 報到 釜山港國際航運總站\n: Departure: 18:30 Check-in at Busan Port International Shipping Terminal
translations.出站一路走出來，經過荒神茶屋(可以在此休憩、吃午餐)，過馬路就會到南藏院入口。\: After exiting the station, walk straight ahead. You'll pass Arajin Chaya (a place to rest and have lunch). Cross the road to reach the entrance of Nanzoin Temple.
translations.出站就是東橫 INN 釜山站 1 號店。\n\n: Exit the station, and you'll find Toyoko INN Busan Station No. 1.
translations.出站左手邊就是「 [西之浦線](https://japantravel.navi: Once you exit the station, the " [Nishinoura Line](https://japantravel.navitime.com/zh-tw/area/jp/railroad/00053916/){:target="_blank"} " platform is on the left, and staff are available to guide you. The ride takes about 30 minutes.
translations.出站後往左手邊馬路走，到對面 2 號等車。\n\n: After exiting the station, walk to the left side of the road and go to the opposite side to wait at bus stop No. 2.
translations.划船場，過橋下去就是了，總長(到剛剛看到的停止線)我覺得差不多 250 公尺。\: Boat dock, just go under the bridge. The total length (up to the stop line I just saw) is about 250 meters.
translations.划船路程不長，來回應該 30–45 分鐘就結束，約 12:00 會吃完午餐、高千: The boat ride is short, taking about 30–45 minutes round trip. Lunch should be finished around 12:00, and the Takachiho tour ends around 13:20. We need to regroup and head back then.
translations.別府塔一樓自動販賣機買票，坐電梯上去，鳥瞰別府濱海區域的市景。\n\n: Buy tickets at the vending machine on the first floor of Beppu Tower, take the elevator up, and enjoy a bird's-eye view of Beppu's coastal city area.
translations.利用KLOOK發行的憑證的客人，請“名”和“姓”的順序輸入您的名字。\n: For customers using vouchers issued by KLOOK, please enter your "First Name" and "Last Name" in the correct order.
translations.到下關口後出來有商店賣簡單的點心，買了一個章魚餅果腹。(裡面 QQ 的、皮脆、真: After arriving at Shimonoseki Port, there are shops selling simple snacks. I bought a takoyaki to satisfy my hunger. (The inside is chewy, the skin is crispy, and it really has octopus. Delicious!)
translations.到信箱中收信，記下「temporary password」並點擊繼續連結。\n\: Check your inbox for the email, note the "temporary password," and click the continue link.
translations.到博多後直接搭地鐵到天神南並在地下街完成行李寄放。(運氣好剛好在 2 號找到最後: After arriving at Hakata, take the subway directly to Tenjin-Minami and store your luggage in the underground mall. (Luckily, I found the last luggage spot at number 2)
translations.到機場先找櫃檯換匯韓幣，外匯提款機幾乎都不提供韓幣只能換日幣； **機場匯率不好: At the airport, first find the counter to exchange Korean won. Foreign exchange ATMs almost never provide Korean won, only Japanese yen; **the airport exchange rate is poor and charges a NT$100 handling fee**. Therefore, if you have time, it is better to exchange currency early at a bank counter.
translations.到機場的時間還太早，櫃檯還沒開放，地勤人員指引我們先去 1 自助報到再去 2 自: It was still too early to go to the airport, and the counters were not open yet. The ground staff guided us to first use 1 self check-in and then 2 self baggage drop-off. They assisted us along the way; the baggage drop-off was completed quickly (this time only 17 Kg).
translations.到第一個高千穗神社約需 3 小時\n: It takes about 3 hours to reach the first Takachiho Shrine.
translations.剛好遇到大分站有佈置裝置藝術（他還會發出聲音）。\n\n: We happened to encounter an art installation at Oita Station (it even made sounds).
translations.剩下血池地獄、龍卷地獄，這兩個地獄就不在這個區域了，需要轉搭公車前往。\n\n: The remaining Blood Pond Hell and Tornado Hell are not in this area and require taking a bus to reach.
translations.午餐吃了海雲台周邊的韓國燒肉 [Baegnyeon Sikdang](https: For lunch, we had Korean BBQ near Haeundae at [Baegnyeon Sikdang](https://restaurantguru.com/%EB%B0%B1%EB%85%84%EC%8B%9D%EB%8B%B9-Busan-2){:target="_blank"}. The staff grilled the meat for us. We ordered Korean beef sirloin and pork neck, both delicious, plus a stone pot rice with a strong crispy rice crust aroma. We shared everything between two people.
translations.午餐就直接在血池地獄極樂亭解決了。\n\n: Lunch was directly taken care of at Chinoike Jigoku Gokurakutei.
translations.午餐本來要吃 由布まぶし 心 有名的由布院釜飯，有兩家一家在金鱗湖本店一家在車站: For lunch, we originally planned to eat Yufu Mabushi Kokoro, a famous Yufuin kamameshi restaurant. There are two locations: one at the Kinrin Lake main store and one at the station exit. The station exit branch was closed that day, and we were too lazy to walk back to the main store, so we switched to the first-floor [Sushi Gen](https://maps.app.goo.gl/AMLzf3ExBFs5gHnf9){:target="_blank"}.
translations.南九州鹿兒島降落 -&gt; 大分 -&gt; [向日葵號郵輪](https:/: Kagoshima in southern Kyushu landing -> Oita -> [Sunflower Ferry](https://www.ferry-sunflower.co.jp/cn/route/kobe-oita/time/){:target="_blank"} -> Kobe -> Himeji Castle -> Amanohashidate -> Return from Nagoya Airport
translations.南藏院是私人院所並因也有供奉塔位，所以規定跟禁止拍照的地方比較多，需要遵守。\n:
Nanzoin Temple is a private institution and also has enshrined memorial tablets, so there are many rules and restricted areas for photography that must be followed.  
**No short sleeves, shorts, exposed midriffs or shoulders; no playing music, dancing, or photography (e.g., the row of memorial tablets at the entrance cave, Fudo Myoo statue).**
translations.博多失利之後回到天神地區的扭蛋店尋找，同樣沒有收穫。\n\n: After failing in Hakata, I returned to the capsule toy shop in the Tenjin area to search, but still had no luck.
translations.博多正下著大雨(雨神發威)，在天神地下街隨便買個天神地下街飯糰當晚餐就拖著行李前: It was pouring rain in Hakata (the rain god was powerful). I casually bought a rice ball at Tenjin Underground Shopping Mall for dinner and then dragged my luggage to the hotel.
translations.原本預計是去唐津城，查了下 JR 特急班次，去祐德稻荷神社比較快跟近加上昨日的勞: Originally planned to visit Karatsu Castle, but after checking JR limited express schedules, going to Yutoku Inari Shrine is faster and closer. Considering yesterday's fatigue, decided to change the itinerary.
translations.去 博多 Yodobashi 的扭蛋區域找也沒找到。\n\n: I couldn't find it even after looking in the gacha capsule toy area at Hakata Yodobashi.
translations.去免稅店買了一些 韓國 Toms Gilim 杏仁果 (經典蜂蜜口味、裹草莓巧克: Bought some Korean Toms Gilim almonds (classic honey flavor, coated strawberry chocolate, tiramisu flavor) at the duty-free shop as souvenirs.
translations.去完最後一個行程之後已下午三點多，要開始回程了(依然是三小時車程回福岡)。\n\: After finishing the last activity, it was already past 3 PM, and it was time to start the return trip (still a three-hour drive back to Fukuoka).
translations.去湯之花小店買了一些入浴劑、面膜、乳霜當伴手禮。\n\n: Went to a small shop called Yunohana and bought some bath additives, face masks, and creams as souvenirs.
translations.去程：華航 台北桃園 TPE 15:55 -> 韓國釜山金海國際機場 PUS 1: Outbound: China Airlines Taipei Taoyuan TPE 15:55 -> Korea Busan Gimhae International Airport PUS 18:55
translations.參拜完回到來的路上有經過的冰店。\n\n: On the way back from the shrine visit, we passed by an ice cream shop.
translations.參拜完就回到車站，一路回 JR。\n\n: After the visit, return to the station and head back to JR.
translations.參拜完離晚餐 17:00 鐵鍋煎餃 鉄なべ 營業還有一個小時，再去大濠公園逛逛。: After the visit, before dinner at 17:00 at Tetsunabe (鉄なべ) for iron skillet fried dumplings, which is still open for another hour, I went to stroll around Ohori Park.
translations.參拜完高千穗神社先去附近吃午餐。\n\n: After visiting Takachiho Shrine, we went nearby for lunch.
translations.另一邊的小血池也蠻特別的。\n\n: The small blood pond on the other side is also quite special.
translations.另外買了養樂多 1000 晚上喝、BRULEE 焦糖冰淇淋當甜點(好甜！)、海老: Also bought a Yakult 1000 to drink at night, BRULEE caramel ice cream as dessert (very sweet!), and fried shrimp as a late-night snack (this time I really got whole fried shrimp, unlike the fake ones I bought in [Kumamoto](../d78e0b15a08a/) QQ).
translations.另外這邊有提供 Private Bath 私人浴場泡湯，如果害羞不敢去公共泡湯的: There is also a Private Bath available here. If you feel shy about using public baths, you might consider trying this option.
translations.另外點了韓啤、韓國燒酒喝個痛快。（忘了試看看燒啤）\n\n: Also ordered Korean beer and soju to drink heartily. (Forgot to try soju mixed with beer)
translations.只是路過走馬看花，就只去查到的主要景點，剛好是對角，公車班次不多、不想等，所以直: Just passing by and taking a quick look, only visiting the main spots I found. They happened to be diagonally opposite, and since bus frequency was low and I didn’t want to wait, I just walked.
translations.只有手持飲料不行\n: Holding drinks only is not allowed.
translations.只有特等室有個人的獨立衛浴，其他為共用\n: Only the deluxe rooms have private bathrooms; others share common facilities.
translations.只能靠機上 Wifi 連接娛樂內容，電影蠻多的！有賽道狂人！飛機餐是三杯雞麵(蠻: You can only access entertainment content via the onboard Wi-Fi, and there are quite a few movies! One of them is "Rush." The in-flight meal was Three-Cup Chicken Noodles (pretty bad), but unexpectedly, there was a collaboration with [China Airlines x Wutonghao x Dinotaeng Quokka](https://www.china-airlines.com/hk/zh/discover/news/press-release/20230628){:target="_blank"}, and I received a quokka snack.
translations.可以先去左邊的觀海平台鳥瞰整個寺院。\n\n: You can first go to the viewing platform on the left to get an aerial view of the entire temple.
translations.可以品嚐一個地獄蒸布丁再走。\n\n: You can enjoy a hell-steamed pudding before you leave.
translations.可以從窗邊看釜山港，時間快到的時候大家就會回到各自的行李旁邊準備上船了。\n\n: You can see Busan Port from the window. When it's almost time, everyone will return to their luggage to get ready to board the ship.
translations.可以攜帶食物跟水，也不用放在行李箱，因為根本不用托運，行李箱隨人上船。\n: You can bring food and water, and you don’t need to put them in your suitcase since there’s no need to check in luggage. Your suitcase goes on board with you.
translations.可直接使用 Line 登入\n: You can log in directly using Line
translations.可能因季節跟天氣關係，去的時候覺得整體色調灰、綠油油，沒有特別有感覺。\n\n: Possibly due to the season and weather, the overall tone felt gray and greenish during the visit, without any special impression.
translations.右圖為 [去年從福岡塔鳥瞰這條路](../d78e0b15a08a/) ，今年是: The right picture shows [this road viewed from Fukuoka Tower last year](../d78e0b15a08a/). This year, it's Fukuoka Tower seen from this road. (A kind of time-space crossover feeling)
translations.右邊那盒漏拍了，是在博多站百貨公司商品街試吃到覺得好吃的蝦餅。\n\n: The box on the right was missed in the photo; it’s shrimp crackers I tried and liked at the department store food street in Hakata Station.
translations.吃了名物地獄極樂咖哩，喜歡日式粒粒分明的米飯配上濃稠的咖哩(微辣)，搭配烤野菜、: Tried the specialty Jigoku Gokuraku Curry, enjoyed the Japanese-style rice with distinct grains paired with thick, mildly spicy curry. Served with grilled vegetables and chicken, it was flavorful without being greasy, smooth and refreshing.
translations.吃完 18:00 出來就開始有一些人在排隊等候了。\n\n: After finishing at 18:00, some people started lining up outside.
translations.吃完午餐會需要徒步前往高千穗峽谷，如果有預約划船或是自己覺得體力無法負荷的，導遊: After lunch, you will need to walk to Takachiho Gorge. If you have booked a boat ride or feel physically unable to walk, the guide has arranged a shuttle bus to take you directly there, saving time.
translations.吃完去商店街晃了一下就搭公車回車站了。\n\n: After eating, I strolled around the shopping street for a bit and then took the bus back to the station.
translations.吃完又再點了另一個名物水果泡芙，裡面餡料豐滿，有真的水果切塊在裡面。\n\n: After eating, I ordered another specialty, the fruit cream puff. It was filled generously with real pieces of fruit inside.
translations.吃飽就忘記海雲台還有個單軌列車可坐還有海雲台 LCT 其實也可以上去看看 (當初: After eating, I forgot that Haeundae also has a monorail and the Haeundae LCT, which you can actually visit (I didn't research the Busan itinerary carefully when planning). It was around 14:00, so I took bus `1001` back to Busan Station, thinking I would decide where to go next or just explore around Busan Station.
translations.吃飽後出甲板晃晃(可以自由進出，小心地滑)。\n\n: After eating, go out on the deck for a walk (free access, but watch out for slippery floors).
translations.吃飽走回飯店，路過正在準備的中洲屋台，這次來發現多好多共享單車。\n\n: After eating, I walked back to the hotel and passed by the Nakasu food stalls being set up. This time, I noticed many more shared bikes.
translations.吃飽飯後一路往下跟著導遊徒步到高千穗峽谷。\n\n: After finishing the meal, we followed the guide on foot down to Takachiho Gorge.
translations.同之前出國會在行李箱放一個 Airtag 方便追蹤\n: Like before, I put an AirTag in my suitcase for easy tracking when traveling abroad.
translations.唐戶市場外的海岸邊有很多人會買完在外面野餐坐著吃，人雖多但還是很乾淨；因為我主要: There are many people sitting by the coast outside Karato Market, having picnics after buying food. Although it’s crowded, the area remains very clean. Since I was mainly scouting the place and don’t eat much raw food, I didn’t go inside. Around noon, it looked quite busy inside.
translations.唐津城需要從下面走一段山坡才會到，時間緊迫，直接左轉去旁邊舞鶴公園搭電梯上去。\: To reach Karatsu Castle, you need to walk up a slope from below. Due to limited time, we turned left and took the elevator at the nearby Maizuru Park instead.
translations.唐津神社(超過 17:00 已休息)、舊唐津銀行( [與東京車站同位建築設計師: Karatsu Shrine (closed after 17:00) and Old Karatsu Bank (designed by Kengo Tatsuno, the same architect as Tokyo Station: [link](https://www.ana.co.jp/zh/tw/japan-travel-planner/saga/0000021.html){:target="_blank"}).
translations.商業午餐 CP 值超高(晚上是高級燒肉套餐料理)＋社恐人天堂獨立包廂。\n\n: Business lunch offers great value (evening is a premium yakiniku set) + a social anxiety-friendly private room.
translations.噴發時的煙霧會形成龍卷，因此得名。\n\n: The smoke during the eruption forms a tornado-like shape, hence the name.
translations.回別府站之後，走去別府塔，路上隨手逛逛。(站前雕像、古老溫泉會館、大天狗)\n\: After returning to Beppu Station, I walked to Beppu Tower, casually exploring along the way. (Statue in front of the station, old hot spring hall, Great Tengu)
translations.回到釜山站大概才 15:00，離郵輪報到時間 18:30 還很久，回釜山才發現釜: Back at Busan Station around 15:00, there was still plenty of time before the cruise check-in at 18:30. Returning to Busan, I realized Busan Station has no places to explore (it seems there are no department stores, shopping streets, or attractions nearby). I considered going to Gamcheon Culture Village but worried it was too far. I found that a few stops from Busan Station, you can visit Busan Tower and nearby department stores and shopping streets.
translations.回到門司港開始飄雨， [門司港去年已經來過](../d78e0b15a08a/): It started drizzling when we returned to Mojiko. Since we had already visited [Mojiko last year](../d78e0b15a08a/), we didn't stay long and prepared to head to the station to pick up our luggage and depart for Kokura and Hakata.
translations.回博多後搭火車前往南藏院前站。\n\n: After returning to Hakata, take the train to Minamizo-in-mae Station.
translations.回程同樣會在中途停靠休息站讓大家上廁所活動活動。\n\n: The return trip will also stop at rest areas for everyone to use the restroom and stretch.
translations.回程時刻表，直達博多的下午每小時一班、回 九大學研都市站 每小時一班。\n\n: Return timetable: direct trains to Hakata run every hour in the afternoon, and trains to Kyudai-Gakken-Toshi Station run every hour.
translations.回程路上順路去 [**蜂之家**](https://g.co/kgs/E62Xt: On the way back, we stopped by [**Honey House**](https://g.co/kgs/E62XtpZ){:target="_blank"} to taste Sasebo's famous lemon steak.
translations.回程：華航 日本福岡機場 FUK 21:00 -> 台北桃園 TPE 22:25: Return trip: China Airlines Japan Fukuoka Airport FUK 21:00 -> Taipei Taoyuan TPE 22:25
translations.回鐵輪 2 再次搭上經海地獄的公車，先前往十字山展望台，眺望別府市；太陽很大很熱: Return to Tetsurin 2 and take the bus passing through Umi Jigoku again, heading first to Juujiyama Observatory to overlook Beppu City. The sun is strong and hot; the observatory only has restrooms, no shops or rest areas.
translations.回頭看釜山港碼頭夜景。\n\n: Looking back at the night view of Busan Port Terminal.
translations.回飯店休息前，刻意在走道中洲屋台看離開福岡前的最後一眼夜景。\n\n: Before resting at the hotel, I deliberately stopped at Nakasu Yatai in the corridor to catch the last night view before leaving Fukuoka.
translations.回飯店休息，一樣去大分站市場買晚餐，豬排便當，跟大分限定水果酒(好喝清爽、不會太: Return to the hotel to rest, then go to Oita Station Market to buy dinner, a pork cutlet bento, and Oita-exclusive fruit wine (tasty, refreshing, not too sweet).
translations.因為怕趕不上公共交通一路狂奔，機捷沒趕上但還好最後趕上客運，不然又要坐不太安全的: Afraid of missing public transportation and having to run all the way, I missed the airport MRT but luckily caught the bus in the end. Otherwise, I would have had to take an unsafe unlicensed taxi back to Taipei.
translations.因為時間晚，附近的燒肉都關門了；隨便找了家豬肉湯飯餐廳解決 ( [The Doi: Because it was late, nearby yakiniku restaurants were closed; I randomly chose a pork soup rice restaurant to eat ( [The Doi Jongga Dwaejigukbap Busan Stn.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/QhTTk1yoKsxxbAV76){:target="_blank"} ).
translations.因為時間還太早，這次就有來一航的免費貴賓室休息區休息了，這時間沒什麼人。\n\n: Since it was still early, I used the free lounge area at Ichihang this time to rest. There weren't many people at this hour.
translations.因為錯過往唐津的列車，也回不去大魚神社海中鳥居，加上昨日的狼狽，所幸決定直接回博: Because we missed the train to Karatsu and couldn't return to the Oyunohama Shrine's torii gate in the sea, plus yesterday's exhaustion, we decided to go straight back to the Hakata hotel to rest.
translations.因車程較長，途中會在休息站休息 10 分鐘讓大家上廁所動動筋骨。\n\n: Due to the long drive, we will stop at a rest area for 10 minutes to allow everyone to use the restroom and stretch their legs.
translations.園區另一邊是鱷魚園。\n\n: On the other side of the park is the crocodile enclosure.
translations.在 [LAWSON（羅森）博多站筑紫口店](https://maps.app.g: In the plaza in front of [LAWSON Hakata Station Chikushi Exit Store](https://maps.app.goo.gl/VmGiPMRDmfNJkLSk8){:target="_blank"}, find the tour guide for your day trip destination. (At the same time, there will be several groups, including those led by KKDAY, EasyGo, and tours to Takachiho, Yufuin, etc.)
translations.在下關口地下人行道的地方下車，這次從另一個角度看 [關門橋](https://w: Get off at the underground pedestrian passage in Shimonoseki Port. This time, view the [Kanmon Bridge](https://www.gururich-kitaq.com/tw/spot/kanmon-bridge){:target="_blank"} from a different angle. **The right side of the photo shows the view from last year at the Mojiko Retro Observation Room** (../d78e0b15a08a/).
translations.在天神 C-pla 扭了一個有趣的公車下車按鈕ＸＤ\n\n: At Tenjin C-pla, I found a fun bus stop button XD
translations.在祐德神社前下車後，往後走就是表參道。\n\n: After getting off in front of Yutoku Shrine, walk backward to reach the main approach.
translations.在路上買了有名的布丁銅鑼燒跟一些伴手禮(胡麻粉、由布院煉瓦工場 — 七大福、文創: Bought the famous pudding dorayaki and some souvenirs on the way (sesame powder, Yufuin Renga Kobo — Seven Lucky Gods, cultural crafts, Yufuin incense…)
translations.在電梯關門前回到入口，順路照著觀光地圖徒步回 JR 唐津站。\n\n: Return to the entrance before the elevator doors close, then walk back to JR Karatsu Station following the tourist map.
translations.塔內有個隕石展。\n\n: There is a meteorite exhibition inside the tower.
translations.塚崎大楠樹，樹齡推估 2,000 年。\n\n: Tsukazaki Great Camphor Tree, estimated to be 2,000 years old.
translations.大分城址只剩下護城河、城牆、庭院，裡面是一個空曠的停車場跟天守閣台地，可以眺望大: Oita Castle site only has the moat, walls, and courtyard remaining. Inside is an open parking lot and the main keep platform, where you can overlook Oita City.
translations.大分整個給人一種遠離喧囂的氛圍，在市區閒晃的時候覺得異常的安靜，只有淡淡的汽車引: Oita gives off a vibe of being far away from the hustle and bustle. When wandering around the city, it feels unusually quiet, with only faint car engine sounds and very few people or vehicles.
translations.大分的天空開始下起小雨，想了一下我去過的每座城市都遇過下雨。( **雨神無誤**: It started drizzling in Oita's sky. Thinking back, it seems I've encountered rain in every city I've visited. (**Definitely the Rain God**)
translations.大家都在這排隊滿冰淇淋，也一起嘗試了宮崎本地芒果冰淇淋(900 日圓)，導遊說宮: Everyone was lining up here for the ice cream, so we also tried the local Miyazaki mango ice cream (900 yen). The guide said Miyazaki mangoes are premium, but honestly, Taiwanese mangoes still have a stronger mango flavor.
translations.大概在釜山站附近亂晃到快五點就去飯店拿行李前往 釜山港國際航運總站 了。\n\n: Around 5 PM, after wandering near Busan Station, I went to the hotel to pick up my luggage and headed to Busan Port International Passenger Terminal.
translations.大濠公園很大，走一圈大概要 45 分鐘；可以踩天鵝船。\n\n: Ohori Park is very large, and it takes about 45 minutes to walk around; you can also ride a swan boat.
translations.大約 10 分鐘就能抵達門司港。(真的有淡水八里渡船的感覺了！)\n\n: It takes about 10 minutes to reach Mojiko. (It really feels like the Tamsui Bali ferry!)
translations.大約 10 點多到小倉站，繞了好久，所有 自助的 [行李寄物櫃](https:/: Arrived at Kokura Station around 10 AM and wandered for a long time. All the self-service [luggage lockers](https://cloak.ecbo.io/zh-TW/jpn/city/fukuoka/43){:target="_blank"} were full (a friend said there were spots at 9 AM). The staffed counter for luggage storage opens at 11 AM, so I had to carry my luggage and head straight to Mojiko to look for options.
translations.大約 16:35 抵達這邊，距離唐津城關門只剩 25 分鐘，想說來都來了就去走走: Arrived here around 16:35, with only 25 minutes left before Karatsu Castle closes. Since I was already here, I decided to take a walk.
translations.大約 17:20 看大家在外面等，沒多久，店員阿嬤就出來招呼可以進去了。\n\n: Around 17:20, seeing everyone waiting outside, the shopkeeper grandma came out shortly to welcome us in.
translations.大約 17:30 到博多站搭公車去 PayPay Dome，晚上 18:00 看: Around 17:30, take a bus from Hakata Station to PayPay Dome. Watch the baseball game at 18:00.
translations.大約 18:30 就開始候機了。\n\n: Started waiting for the flight around 18:30.
translations.大約 22:30 船就會開始駛離釜山港，經過釜山港大橋，出來看橋的夜景非常美。(: Around 22:30, the ship will start departing from Busan Port, passing under the Busan Port Bridge. The night view of the bridge is very beautiful. (It will be cold, so dress warmly)
translations.大約 7 局打完就已經 9:1，大家就開始陸續離場了，我也沒看到最後。\n\n: After about 7 innings, the score was already 9:1, and people started leaving one after another. I didn't watch until the end.
translations.大約走 20 分鐘的步道就能看到高千穗峽谷，從這個角度可以看到峽谷尾部(划船終止: About a 20-minute walk on the trail leads to Takachiho Gorge, where you can see the end of the gorge (the boat turning point) from this angle.
translations.大雨，天候不佳，當不成航海王，只能撐著傘吹著風淋著雨。\n\n: Heavy rain and bad weather, can't be a pirate king, just holding an umbrella, feeling the wind and getting soaked in the rain.
translations.天守閣已關閉參觀，上來看看風景跟唐津城而已。\n\n: The main keep is closed to visitors; we just came up to enjoy the view and see Karatsu Castle.
translations.天安河原山洞，就是天照大神曾經躲起來的地方；神社鳥居周圍堆滿了參拜者留下來的石頭: Amano Iwato Cave is where the sun goddess Amaterasu once hid; the shrine's torii gate is surrounded by stones left by worshippers.
translations.好在登船前有吃一個三明治，沒有很餓，隨便買個泡麵解決一頓。\n\n: Fortunately, I ate a sandwich before boarding, so I wasn't very hungry and just bought some instant noodles to settle a meal.
translations.如上圖，Wowpass 餘額 454 KRW / Tmoney 餘額 2,500: As shown in the image above, Wowpass balance is 454 KRW / Tmoney balance is 2,500 KRW
translations.如同 [前幾次出國](../d78e0b15a08a/) ，到機捷台北車站 A1: As with [previous trips abroad](../d78e0b15a08a/), when arriving at Taipei Main Station A1 on the Airport MRT, first complete the pre-check-in. This allows you to proceed directly to immigration at the airport. ( [For flights eligible for pre-check-in and regulations, please refer to the official website](https://web.taoyuan-airport.com/ITCI/mobile/index.html){:target="_blank"} ).
translations.如本篇遊記對您有幫助，可以在 Wowpass 註冊時輸入我的邀請碼： `373T: If this travelogue is helpful to you, you can enter my invitation code `373TBH87` when registering on Wowpass.
translations.如果時間有限我覺得可以只去海地獄\n: If time is limited, I think you can just visit the Sea Hell.
translations.如果有交通卡可以直接刷卡進\n: If you have a transportation card, you can simply tap to enter.
translations.完成密碼設定後，在可預約時間( **日本時間 05:30~23:00 可接受預約: After setting the password, you can check and book reserved train seats on the homepage during the available booking hours (**Japan time 05:30~23:00**); **booking is not available outside these hours**.
translations.官方有提供一個 [AR App](https://apps.apple.com/: The official [AR App](https://apps.apple.com/hk/app/%E5%BA%9C%E5%86%85%E5%9F%8Ear/id1328720439){:target="_blank"} lets you see what Oita Castle looked like before.
translations.宵夜是草莓冰沙冰淇淋、燒烤、麒麟期間限定鳳梨酒(鳳梨味足夠、有點甜)。\n\n: Late-night snacks were strawberry smoothie ice cream, barbecue, and Kirin limited-edition pineapple sake (strong pineapple flavor, slightly sweet).
translations.宵夜，日清咚兵衛豆皮泡麵(這次來那麼多天才第一次吃)、大分產的水果酒、超商雞油炸: Late-night snack: Nissin Donbei Inari Udon (first time trying it after so many days), fruit wine from Oita, and convenience store fried chicken (juicy and delicious).
translations.導遊(中文)手上有名單，完成報到後會跟你說車號，記好車號就能直接上車了。\n\n: The tour guide (Chinese-speaking) will have a list. After you check in, they will tell you the bus number. Remember the bus number, and you can board the bus directly.
translations.導遊會補充在遊覽車上有介紹的天照大神的故事。\n\n: The tour guide will also share the story of Amaterasu on the bus.
translations.導遊自我介紹(石楠)、中英日文\n:
### Tour Guide Self-Introduction (Ishinan) - Chinese, English, Japanese

**Chinese:**  
大家好，我是石楠，這次很高興能成為大家的導遊。希望能帶給大家愉快又難忘的旅程。

**English:**  
Hello everyone, I am Ishinan. I am very happy to be your tour guide this time. I hope to bring you a pleasant and memorable trip.

**Japanese:**  
皆さん、こんにちは。私は石楠です。今回、皆さんのガイドを務めることができてとても嬉しいです。楽しくて忘れられない旅にしたいと思います。
translations.平日早上回博多搭地鐵人也沒有很多，不怕尷尬 (九州就是空曠！)\n: On a weekday morning returning to Hakata by subway, there aren't many people, so no need to feel awkward (Kyushu is just spacious!).
translations.店員人不錯、英文也還算通\n: The staff were nice, and their English was fairly good.
translations.往上走會有整排的祈福風鈴，去的時候都沒人，經過風鈴時剛好一陣風，響徹咣當。\n\: Going up, there is a row of prayer wind chimes. When I visited, there was no one around. As I passed by the chimes, a gust of wind made them ring loudly.
translations.往下走就是龍卷地獄。\n\n: Going down leads to Tornado Hell.
translations.往回下到明礬地獄，售票口在對面的 [岡本屋布丁店](https://www.ok: Head back down to Myoban Hell. The ticket office is across the street at [Okamotoya Pudding Shop](https://www.okamotoya.net/){:target="_blank"}. Just tell the staff you want to go to the opposite side.
translations.往回到鐵輪 2 公車站的路上想說去貴船城看看，城池很小，瞭望的景觀不錯，不過從公: On the way back to the Tetsuwa 2 bus stop, I decided to visit Kifune Castle. The castle is small, but the view from the lookout is nice. However, walking from the bus stop and going uphill was quite tiring.
translations.往大分城址的路上公園停車場有一個巨大九重葛(很像咒術迴戰的什麼詛咒)。\n\n: On the way to Oita Castle Ruins, there is a huge bougainvillea at the park parking lot (it looks like some curse from Jujutsu Kaisen).
translations.後方有一個台地跟小神社。\n\n: Behind is a terrace and a small shrine.
translations.後面仔細研究了一下才發現要看時刻表的右下角框框才是正確的候車月台，平日假日的月台: After careful study, I found that you need to check the bottom right box of the timetable to find the correct boarding platform. The platform may differ between weekdays and holidays.
translations.後面覺得這邊太吵混亂，就往 501–504 北邊走，這邊沒什麼人；也有家咖啡廳簡: Later, feeling that this area was too noisy and chaotic, we walked north toward 501–504, where there were fewer people; there was also a café and light meal shop to eat.
translations.從 JR 唐津要走約 20 分鐘才能到唐津城，搭高速巴士會在唐津城前橋下車，因此: From JR Karatsu, it takes about a 20-minute walk to Karatsu Castle. The express bus stops at Karatsu Castle-mae Bridge, so I decided to take the express bus. (Also my first time riding it!)
translations.從上面看街道、車，很療癒。\n\n: Looking at the streets and cars from above is very soothing.
translations.從下要走一小段樓梯往上到武雄神社。\n\n: From below, walk up a short flight of stairs to take you to Takeo Shrine.
translations.從人行道入口搭電梯到 B1 就是徒步區了，人員免費、腳踏車要收 20 日圓過路費: Take the elevator from the sidewalk entrance down to B1 to reach the pedestrian zone. Pedestrians enter for free, but bicycles must pay a 20 yen crossing fee. Also, watch out for wild boars in this area XD
translations.從博多搭乘前往 鹿島市 - 肥前鹿島站。\n\n: Take a train from Hakata to Kashima City - Hizen Kashima Station.
translations.從大分站到別府站搭 JR 特急約只需 15 分鐘，路上的景色有點像 [廣島去吳市: It takes about 15 minutes by JR Limited Express from Oita Station to Beppu Station. The scenery along the way is somewhat similar to the route from Hiroshima to Kure.
translations.從大廳上到 3F 出境，先去 New Camellia 兌換船票。(需要護照)\: Go from the lobby up to 3F for departure, then go to New Camellia to exchange your ship ticket. (Passport required)
translations.從天神南走到天神蠻遠的，拖著行李大概需要 15 分鐘。\n\n: Walking from Tenjin Minami to Tenjin is quite far, and it takes about 15 minutes with luggage.
translations.從天神地下街西 8 的出口，Fukuoka Mitsukoshi 三越百貨跟著指: From Exit West 8 of Tenjin Underground Shopping Mall, follow the signs from Fukuoka Mitsukoshi department store to the 3rd floor of Tenjin Express Bus Terminal to reach the bus station.
translations.從對面的角度看關門橋、門司港懷舊展望室，有台灣八里看淡水那感覺了。\n\n: Viewing the Kanmon Bridge and Mojiko Retro Observation Room from the opposite side feels like looking at Tamsui from Bali, Taiwan.
translations.從武雄車站(無人車站，JR Pass 不需投入、直接出站)，出來街道上也人煙稀少: From Takeo Station (an unmanned station, no need to insert JR Pass, just exit directly), the street outside is also sparsely populated and very quiet.
translations.從海東龍宮寺外公車站再次搭乘 `1001` 往回到海雲台 (約 1 小時)。\n: From the bus stop outside Haedong Yonggungsa Temple, take the `1001` bus back to Haeundae (about 1 hour).
translations.從由布院車站一路到金鱗湖的街道上有非常多的 IP、文創小店可以逛，對美食有興趣的: From Yufuin Station to Kinrinko Lake, there are many IP-themed and creative shops along the street to explore. If you're interested in food, you can also check out Yufuin's award-winning desserts, including pudding, ice cream, and more.
translations.從碼頭到上船大概還需要走跟等待個 15–20 分鐘。\n\n: It takes about 15–20 minutes to walk and wait from the pier to boarding the ship.
translations.從金海機場到釜山站，地鐵一共要轉三次車；搭下來人沒有很多，不怕擁擠。\n\n: From Gimhae Airport to Busan Station, you need to transfer three times on the subway; the trains are not crowded, so there is no need to worry about congestion.
translations.從高千穗峽這邊的橋看回去剛剛走來的古道跟下方的船。\n\n: Looking back from the bridge at Takachiho Gorge, you can see the ancient path we just walked and the boat below.
translations.快到唐戶市場的路上會經過赤間神宮，順路前去參拜。\n\n: On the way to Karato Market, we passed by Akama Shrine and stopped by for a visit.
translations.我們這團有 3 組人有預約。\n\n: There are 3 groups in our party with reservations.
translations.我吃的是豐後牛牛排、我朋友吃的是丼飯；牛很好吃，很香很 Juice 並且沒什麼腥: I had the Bungo beef steak, and my friend had the rice bowl; the beef was very tasty, flavorful, juicy, and had little to no gamey smell. The price was also affordable.
translations.我覺得以旅遊地圖來說，比 Google Map 好用！\n: I find it more useful than Google Maps when it comes to travel maps!
translations.扣除掉設備舊，這家 APA 的房間大小、景觀真的不錯。\n\n: Except for the old facilities, the room size and view at this APA hotel are really good.
translations.找不到要找的扭蛋就離開 Lalaport 回博多站，1010 裡面也有 Pon!: Couldn't find the gacha machine I wanted, so I left Lalaport and returned to Hakata Station. Pon! is also inside 1010, but still no luck.
translations.把衣服投入洗衣機後就去博多站百貨公司地下街覓食了。\n\n: After putting the clothes into the washing machine, I went to the underground shopping area of Hakata Station's department store to find something to eat.
translations.拿到實體卡後就可以在 [Wowpass App](https://apps.ap: After receiving the physical card, you can bind it in the [Wowpass App](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/wowpass-%E4%B8%80%E5%8D%A1%E5%9C%A8%E6%89%8B%E6%9A%A2%E9%81%8A%E9%9F%93%E5%9C%8B/id1626691440){:target="_blank"}
translations.按了會有聲音ＸＤ。\n\n: Pressing it makes a sound XD.
translations.按照地板指示前往月台\n: Follow the floor signs to the platform
translations.接近中午去博多站百貨公司晃晃、買伴手禮、福岡產的清酒、福砂屋長崎蛋糕、小倉名月米: Near noon, I visited the department stores at Hakata Station to browse, buy souvenirs, Fukuoka sake, Fukusaya Nagasaki Castella, Kokura Meigetsu rice crackers, and more.
translations.接近對馬島就進入日本境內了，要換成日本 SIM 卡\n: Approaching Tsushima Island means entering Japan, so it's time to switch to a Japanese SIM card.
translations.接駁車班次蠻密集的，大約 5–10 分鐘一班，路程大約 10 分鐘，下車還要再走: The shuttle bus runs frequently, about every 5–10 minutes, and the ride takes around 10 minutes. After getting off, you still need to walk to the 3rd floor departure hall. Conservatively, it takes an additional 30 minutes from the airport subway line to actually reach the international terminal.
translations.提著戰利品回飯店休息，吃個熱狗跟甜品還有 **日本必喝！生可樂！**\n\n: Carrying our loot back to the hotel to rest, having a hot dog and dessert along with **a must-drink in Japan! Fresh Cola!**
translations.搭乘往博多的特急，約 18:00 回到博多。\n\n: Take the limited express train to Hakata, arriving around 18:00.
translations.搭乘機場線到福岡機場站(國內線)之後還要轉機場接駁車(免費)到國際航站樓。\n\: Take the Airport Line to Fukuoka Airport Station (Domestic Terminal), then transfer to the free airport shuttle bus to the International Terminal.
translations.搭乘電梯單趟 100 日圓，從門口販賣機買票交給服務人員即可。\n\n: Taking the elevator costs 100 yen per ride. Buy a ticket from the vending machine at the entrance and give it to the staff.
translations.搭往回(博多、武雄溫泉)方向的列車，這邊是底站所以要等清潔人員清潔完畢才能上車；: For trains heading back toward Hakata and Takeo Onsen, this is the terminal station, so you need to wait for the cleaning staff to finish before boarding. Just like on the way here, the train runs in reverse from Haiki to Sasebo.
translations.撰寫入境卡、報關卡、 [檢疫 QRCode 可預先申請](https://qco: Fill out the immigration card and customs declaration form. You can [pre-apply for the quarantine QR code](https://qcode.kdca.go.kr/){:target="_blank"}. If not applied, you need to fill out an additional quarantine form.
translations.放好行李出來覓食。\n\n: Put down the luggage and go out to find food.
translations.整個出境非常快，過安檢也是意思意思而已(所有東西過 X 光)\n: The entire departure process was very quick, and the security check was just a formality (everything went through the X-ray).
translations.整體設施蠻舊的，不過保持的乾淨\n: The overall facilities are quite old but well maintained and clean.
translations.新山茶花號太晚訂就只有經濟通鋪 (8–11 人男女混睡、只有日式公共澡堂、晚上: If you book the New Camellia cruise too late, only economy dormitory beds are available (8–11 people, mixed gender, Japanese-style public bath only, lights out at 11 PM).
translations.旁邊就是 海雲台傳統市場，主要是賣當地海鮮，買了支冰淇淋走了一圈，又去另外一家賣: Next to it is Haeundae Traditional Market, mainly selling local seafood. I bought an ice cream and walked around, then went to another shop selling ice cream croissants and had a tea-flavored ice cream croissant (crispy outside, soft inside, delicious!).
translations.既然是夜景，早上來沒什麼好看的，很曬而已。\n\n: Since it's a night view, there's nothing much to see in the morning, just a lot of sun.
translations.早上先去唐吉訶德(24 hr) 簡單採買， [天神本店](https://map: In the morning, we first went to Don Quijote (24 hr) for some quick shopping. The [Tenjin Main Store](https://maps.app.goo.gl/o9DNmBbXiVHrsrwNA){:target="_blank"} is very large, with several floors to explore.
translations.早上沒事先去逛 Lalaport。(10 點營業)\n\n: No plans in the morning, so I went to browse Lalaport (opens at 10 AM).
translations.早上陰天，也來到 JR Pass 的最後一天，沒辦法更改行程，只能繼續搭上前往佐: The morning was cloudy, and it was the last day of the JR Pass. Unable to change the itinerary, I had to continue taking the train to Sasebo.
translations.時間大約來到下午 16:00，快要結束這次旅行了，最後坐在客美多咖啡吃個甜點跟咖: Around 4:00 PM, the trip was coming to an end. Finally, I sat at Komeda Coffee to enjoy some dessert and coffee while resting.
translations.時間接近 11 點，沒吃早餐很餓，就在三樓美食街吃海鮮天婦羅蓋飯解決(覺得很鹹): As it was almost 11 o'clock and I hadn't had breakfast, I ate a seafood tempura rice bowl at the food court on the third floor (found it quite salty).
translations.時間約莫 14:00 了，抓了一下時間去到唐津城大約會在 4:30 左右，分秒必: It's around 14:00, and estimating arrival at Karatsu Castle around 4:30, every second counts. So, in Kokura, I used New Taiwan Dollars (Japanese Yen) to buy a Sanyo Shinkansen ticket for the Kokura to Hakata section, the world's fastest at 300 km/h, **taking only 15 minutes (JR Limited Express takes 45 minutes, local train takes 65 minutes)**.
translations.時間還很早，想說去周圍晃晃，隨手打開 Google Map 看看附近的景點。\n: It was still early, so I decided to take a walk around and casually opened Google Maps to check nearby attractions.
translations.晚餐不知道要吃什麼，隨意買個豬排飯跟 Suntory 無酒精氣泡飲 (好喝！)；: For dinner, not sure what to eat, so I casually bought a pork cutlet rice and a Suntory non-alcoholic sparkling drink (delicious!). The sauce packets in Japan are thoughtfully designed with a small corner for easy opening.
translations.晚餐吃完去 GS 25 買韓啤跟韓國小零食吃，Kelly 好喝、右邊這個像辣條但: After dinner, we went to GS 25 to buy Korean beer and snacks. Kelly was tasty, the one on the right is like spicy strips but less salty and spicy, perfect as a drinking snack, while the crab-flavored crackers were just okay.
translations.晚餐隨便買了超商熱狗、前幾天 Day 6 有吃過的天神地下街飯糰，新的葡萄口味: For dinner, I casually bought a convenience store hot dog and a rice ball from Tenjin Underground Mall that I had on Day 6. The new grape-flavored Suntory is delicious!! For dessert, I had a BRULEE.
translations.晶片部分可在商家刷卡使用\n: The chip can be used for card payments at merchants.
translations.暫時無法從 Wowpass 入金 Tmoney (官方說未來可以)\n: Temporarily unable to top up Tmoney via Wowpass (officially stated it will be possible in the future)

translations.最後放棄，去逛逛樓上的 Animate、Kiddy Land（有超多 IP 的周: Finally gave up and went to browse Animate and Kiddy Land upstairs (they have lots of IP merchandise).

translations.會經過地獄溫泉博物館(咖啡廳)，可以休憩一下。\n\n: You will pass by the Jigoku Onsen Museum (café), where you can take a break.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有個小公園、商店街，可以吃吃冰或點心補充體力。\n\n: There is a small park and shopping street where you can enjoy ice cream or snacks to recharge.
translations.有兩個插座(不用轉接頭)，可以輪流充電\n: There are two power outlets (no adapter needed), allowing you to charge devices alternately.

translations.有娛樂室、KTV\n: There is a recreation room and KTV.
translations.有非上述旅行社發行的MCO的客人，請不要做任何選擇。\n: For guests with MCOs not issued by the above travel agencies, please do not make any selections.
translations.本來想說吃個 [門司咖哩燒，去年來的時候都沒人，爽爽吃不用排隊](../d78e: I originally planned to eat [Moji Curry-yaki, which had no lines last year and was easy to enjoy](../d78e0b15a08a/), but when I got out of the station, I saw a long queue and gave up. I turned right to the Mojiko Bus Station to wait for the bus to Shimonoseki Port.
translations.本來想說橘線搭去三重轉機捷，但機捷另一個預辦登機站是在 **A3 新北產業園區站: I originally planned to take the Orange Line to Sanchong to transfer to the Airport MRT, but the other check-in station for the Airport MRT is at **A3 New Taipei Industrial Park Station, not Sanchong Station**. Also, there’s no direct train from Sanchong, so I ended up transferring at Taipei Main Station instead.
translations.東長寺二樓有福岡大佛可以參拜(50 日圓)。\n\n: On the second floor of Tochoji Temple, there is the Fukuoka Great Buddha available for worship (50 yen).
translations.橘線 1 號線 坐到 釜山站 下車\n: Take the Orange Line 1 to Busan Station and get off.
translations.檸檬牛排就是四片牛排薄片＋醬汁＋檸檬片＋檸檬汁，口感清爽、肉量稍微不足。\n\n: Lemon steak consists of four thin slices of beef, sauce, lemon slices, and lemon juice. It has a refreshing taste but the meat portion is slightly small.
translations.此行主要是去踩 [韓國釜山到日本福岡(博多)的新山茶花號郵輪](https://: This trip mainly tested the [New Camellia Ferry from Busan, South Korea to Fukuoka (Hakata), Japan](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/138770-cargo-passenger-ferry-new-camellia-fukuoka-hakata-port-busan-port?cid=19365&ud1=d78e0b15a08a){:target="_blank"} route, along with Yufuin (Yufuin), Oita Beppu, and Takachiho in Miyazaki Prefecture.
translations.武雄大楠樹有圍起來，只能遠觀。\n\n: Takeo Giant Camphor Tree is fenced off, so it can only be viewed from a distance.
translations.武雄市觀光地圖，查資料有查到御船山樂園看起來不錯，但此時已差不多 15:30，來: Takeo City tourist map. I found that Mifuneyama Rakuen looks nice, but it was already around 15:30, so there was no time to visit.
translations.武雄神社參拜完就往回走去看另一邊蓬萊湯門樓。\n\n: After visiting Takeo Shrine, we walked back to see the Horai-yu gate on the other side.
translations.武雄神社旁邊穿過御神木鳥居再往後走約 5 分鐘就能看到傳說中的武雄大楠樹。(樹齡: Next to Takeo Shrine, pass through the sacred tree torii and walk about 5 minutes further to see the legendary Takeo Great Camphor Tree. (Estimated age: 3,000 years)
translations.每個人空間小、枕頭很硬、簡單床墊、新的床單、被子\n: Small personal space, hard pillows, simple mattress, new bed sheets, and quilts.
translations.每個地獄都有免費休憩泡腳區\n: Each hell has a free foot bath rest area.
translations.每日步行平均都在 2 萬步上下，最高走到 27,000 步。\n\n: The daily average steps were around 20,000, with a maximum of 27,000 steps.
translations.比較了一下 大魚神社海中鳥居 跟 唐津城，感覺海中鳥居普普通通（ [畢竟見識過嚴: Compared the Oyashiro Shrine's Torii Gate in the Sea with Karatsu Castle, the sea Torii feels ordinary (after all, I've seen the famous Itsukushima Shrine's floating Torii gate) and the transportation is inconvenient, so I plan to visit Karatsu instead.
translations.沿著街道一路走到底就是金鱗湖，綠油油的湖畔透露著一絲寧靜。\n\n: Walk straight down the street to reach Kinrin Lake, where the lush green lakeside exudes a sense of tranquility.
translations.海地獄我覺得是最壯觀的，有著不停翻騰的蒸氣與湛藍的泉水。\n\n: I think Sea Hell is the most spectacular, with constantly boiling steam and deep blue spring water.
translations.海雲台海水浴場有救生員、有拉紅線範圍，也可以安排水上活動。\n\n: Haeundae Beach has lifeguards and marked swimming areas with red lines. Water activities can also be arranged.
translations.湯之花小屋就是用來乾燥溫泉得到結晶的，往上走到湯之花商店有賣這個溫泉入浴劑。\n: Yunohana Hut is used to dry hot spring water to obtain crystals. If you go up to the Yunohana Shop, they sell this hot spring bath additive.
translations.湯布院昭和館很有日式傳統感。\n\n: Yufuin Showakan has a strong traditional Japanese atmosphere.
translations.滾動到下方找到「鐵路周遊券購買」->「查詢/更改/退款」\n\n: Scroll down to find "Rail Pass Purchase" -> "Inquiry/Change/Refund"
translations.漫步回飯店，晚餐超商隨意解決，御飯糰、豬排三明治、 **不二家桃子氣泡飲(好喝！: Strolling back to the hotel, dinner was casually picked up at a convenience store: rice balls, pork cutlet sandwich, and **Fujiya peach soda (delicious!!)**. After staying many times at APA and Toyoko Inn, I finally realized they all have ice machines—so convenient!
translations.灶地獄另一個特色是有整排的溫泉周邊體驗，岩盤足浴、飲溫泉水(喝起來有點稠稠鹹鹹的: Another feature of the Cooking Pot Hell is the row of hot spring experiences, including stone foot baths, drinking hot spring water (which tastes a bit thick and salty), foot soaking, facial steaming, hand steaming, and throat steaming (just like visiting a pediatrician in Taiwan XD).
translations.灶地獄的牛奶池感覺很好泡。\n\n: The Milk Pond at Zao Jigoku feels great for soaking.
translations.煎餃都是現點現煎，上來還會滋滋滋，皮薄很脆，內餡應該是韭菜豬肉，單純不鹹又很有食: Pan-fried dumplings are cooked fresh to order, sizzling when served. The skin is thin and crispy, and the filling is likely chive and pork, simple and not salty, highlighting the natural flavors of the ingredients.
translations.熊本：熊本城、阿蘇中岳、阿蘇神社、水前寺承趣園、鶴舞百貨、上通商店街、下通商店街: Kumamoto: Kumamoto Castle, Aso Nakadake, Aso Shrine, Suizenji Jojuen Garden, Tsurumai Department Store, Kamitori Shopping Street, Shimotori Shopping Street, Kato Shrine, Sakuramachi Department Store, Kumamon Square (Director's Office)
translations.甜點/宵夜是炸蝦、泡麵、白桃冰淇淋，跟茉莉花燒灼(我不愛燒灼)。\n\n: Dessert/late-night snacks were fried shrimp, instant noodles, white peach ice cream, and jasmine flower brûlée (which I don't like).
translations.由 `布院之森` 博多往由布院沒預定到，只能預定 `由布 1` 的位子。\n\n: The `Yufuin no Mori` train from Hakata to Yufuin was fully booked, so I could only reserve a seat on the `Yufu 1` train.
translations.由布院之森太晚訂沒位子，只能搭一般的由布 JR\n: Yufuin no Mori was fully booked due to late reservation, so I had to take the regular Yufu JR train.
translations.當天豔陽高照，海灘有沙雕展覽。\n\n: The sun was shining brightly that day, and there was a sand sculpture exhibition on the beach.
translations.當時誤會 wowpass 跟 tmoney 的關係，以為只有兩個合再一起的卡；我: At that time, I misunderstood the relationship between wowpass and tmoney, thinking there were only two combined cards. My understanding was that wowpass is a cash card for loading, currency exchange, withdrawal, and shopping, while tmoney is a transportation card, and wowpass includes tmoney; **actually, you only need to buy tmoney, not wowpass**. I didn’t realize this and kept looking for wowpass instead of tmoney. **There are no wowpass machines at Busan International Airport**, so I had to buy tickets with cash and took the train all the way to Busan.
translations.當然也少不了四處可見的龍貓之森、吉伊卡哇、還有「九州特產」熊本熊。\n\n: Of course, you can't miss the widely seen Totoro Forest, Jiikawa, and the "Kyushu specialty" Kumamon.
translations.白天的釜山港大橋。\n\n: Busan Port Bridge during the day.
translations.白池地獄出來一路往下走到路口左轉，往前早到鐵輪 2 號站等車。\n\n: After leaving Shiraike Jigoku, walk straight down to the intersection and turn left. Go straight ahead to Tetsunawa Stop No. 2 to wait for the bus.
translations.白池地獄較無特色，有一個小的熱帶魚水族館。\n\n: Shiraike Jigoku is less distinctive and has a small tropical fish aquarium.
translations.神社入口，後方玻璃建築是電梯，不想走上去可以 [付費搭乘電梯](https://: At the shrine entrance, the glass building behind houses an elevator. If you prefer not to walk up, you can [take the elevator for a fee](https://www.ana.co.jp/zh/tw/japan-travel-planner/saga/0000006.html){:target="_blank"}.
translations.福岡市美術館週一沒有營業，只能遠觀草間彌生南瓜。\n\n: Fukuoka City Museum of Art is closed on Mondays, so you can only admire Yayoi Kusama's pumpkin from afar.
translations.福岡機場出境的候機廳是狹長型的，人很多很多，非常混亂擁擠。(不知道是不是因為還在: The departure lounge at Fukuoka Airport is long and narrow, very crowded and chaotic. (Not sure if it's because of ongoing renovations and too many flights waiting to take off).
translations.福岡機場正在整修，比較混亂。\n\n: Fukuoka Airport is under renovation, making it a bit chaotic.
translations.福岡軟體銀鷹隊的吉祥物就叫 Harry，當然要來看球支持一下。\n\n: The mascot of the Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks is named Harry, so of course, I had to watch a game and show my support.
translations.福岡：門司港、小倉城、櫛田神社、住吉神社、中洲屋台、福岡塔、Pay Pay Do: Fukuoka: Mojiko, Kokura Castle, Kushida Shrine, Sumiyoshi Shrine, Nakasu Yatai, Fukuoka Tower, PayPay Dome, Tenjin Shopping, Hakata Canal City, Lalaport, Yanagawa Boat Tour, Dazaifu
translations.空間很小，最多可以住到 11 人，這次是一組家庭 (3人) + 兩對夫妻 (4: The space is very small, accommodating up to 11 people. This time, it was a family group (3 people) + two couples (4 people) + me and my friend (2 people), so it wasn't fully occupied; **it seems they arrange people who speak the same language or are from the same country together (in this room, except for one couple from Hong Kong/Macau, the rest were Taiwanese).**
translations.第一段票 紫線釜山金海輕軌 從 機場站 到 沙上站\n: First ticket: Busan-Gimhae Light Rail (Purple Line) from Airport Station to Sasang Station
translations.第一航廈出境買個頂呱呱炸雞當午餐。\n\n: Bought a Ding Gua Gua fried chicken for lunch at Terminal 1 departure.
translations.簡單買個豬排三明治跟去投幾罐生可樂、桃子水帶回台灣。\n\n: Simply buy a pork cutlet sandwich and grab a few cans of draft cola and peach water to bring back to Taiwan.
translations.精品、化妝品免稅店蠻完整的，店員也都會中文；伴手禮店也有(這裡就有福砂屋長崎蛋糕: The duty-free shops for luxury goods and cosmetics are quite complete, and the staff all speak Chinese. There are also souvenir shops (this place has Fukusaya Nagasaki Castella). There is only one duty-free shop for tobacco and alcohol, which requires lining up. As for food and convenience stores, they are extremely crowded with long lines.
translations.約 17:00 回飯店拿行李，慢慢往福岡機場移動，本來以為下午五點多地鐵人會很多: Around 17:00, I went back to the hotel to pick up my luggage and slowly headed to Fukuoka Airport. I thought the subway would be crowded after 5 PM, but it was actually not very busy.
translations.約 17:30 就開始候船了，等候出境廳很大； **其實可以四處晃晃、買吃的帶上: Around 17:30, boarding started. The waiting area for departure is very spacious; **you can actually walk around and buy food to bring on board**.
translations.約 20:30 開始登機，這班沒有特別檢查手提行李一件的規定(但我早就全塞成一件: Boarding started around 20:30. This flight did not have a strict rule about carrying only one piece of hand luggage (but I had already packed everything into one bag). At 21:00, we prepared for takeoff, and the plane took off at 21:09. The aircraft was an A330–300 with older equipment.
translations.約 21:00 另一艘往下關市的郵輪(PUKWAN FERRY)會先出發。\n\: Around 21:00, another ferry (PUKWAN FERRY) heading to Shimonoseki City will depart first.
translations.約莫 13:00 就完成出境手續了。\n\n: By around 13:00, the exit procedures were completed.
translations.紫線到 沙上站 後下車按照指示往綠線移動\n: Take the purple line to Sasang Station, then get off and follow the signs to transfer to the green line.
translations.結束大雨中沒看到什麼東西的遊覽後就一路返回佐世保了。\n\n: After the heavy rain tour with little to see, we headed straight back to Sasebo.
translations.綠線 2 號線 坐到 西面站\n: Take the Green Line 2 to Seomyeon Station
translations.綠線 坐到 西面站 後下車，一路朝 橘線 月台前進\n: Take the green line to Seomyeon Station, get off, and head straight towards the orange line platform.
translations.綠線到橘線轉乘不需要進出月台，不確定當時在綠線買票能不能買到 釜山站，那時候沒仔: You don't need to exit the platform when transferring from the green line to the orange line. I'm not sure if you can buy a ticket to Busan Station on the green line at that time, as I didn't check carefully. Therefore, when exiting at Busan Station, I couldn't leave and had to get a manual ticket adjustment to exit.
translations.網路至少離港到 11 點多都還連得上 (據說是只有一小段可能沒網路)\n: The internet connection lasted until around 11 o'clock after departure (it is said there was only a short period without internet).
translations.網路這次一樣買 [DJB](https://djbcard.com/){:tar: This time I bought [DJB](https://djbcard.com/){:target="_blank"} again, with 2 days 2GB in Korea and 9 days unlimited data in Japan, totaling NT$1,250.
translations.總計：$14,291，平均 1 晚 $1,400，這次終於達成壓在 1 晚 $1: Total: $14,291, averaging $1,400 per night. This time, I finally kept it under $1,500 per night. **Thanks to Toyoko INN**!
translations.繼續下一頁選擇座位偏好、位置、車廂。\n: Continue to the next page to select seat preference, location, and car number.
translations.背景報紙是買 Le Labo 送的。\n\n: The background newspaper was a gift with the purchase of Le Labo.
translations.船艙內有座位。\n\n: There are seats inside the cabin.
translations.花卉村看起來太觀光、人很多，就沒特別進去看了。\n\n: The Flower Village looked too touristy and crowded, so I didn't go in to see it.
translations.行前計畫如下：(出發前一天才規劃好， **實際順序不一定照計劃** 、南阿蘇太遠: The pre-trip plan is as follows: (Planned just one day before departure, **the actual order may not follow the plan**, and we later skipped Minami Aso because it was too far)
translations.行李安頓好大約 20:00，船大約 10:30 才會開始離港。\n\n: Luggage was settled around 20:00, and the ship was scheduled to depart around 10:30.
translations.行李箱可放在行李間，如果怕滑動可以放橫著。\n: Suitcases can be placed in the luggage compartment; if you are worried about sliding, you can place them horizontally.
translations.行程介紹，導遊說高千穗一日遊是全部一日遊方案裡最遠的最辛苦的ＸＤ\n: Itinerary introduction: The guide said the Takachiho day tour is the farthest and toughest among all the full-day tour options XD
translations.補一些 [上次九州沒去到的地點](../d78e0b15a08a/) 。\n\n: Adding some [places I missed last time in Kyushu](../d78e0b15a08a/).
translations.裡面衛浴兼廁所，數量不多(目測約五間)，很乾淨高級，清潔人員打掃的也很即時。\n: The bathrooms with toilets inside are limited in number (estimated about five), very clean and high-end. The cleaning staff also maintain them promptly.
translations.視野、距離跟上次比就差很多了。\n\n: The view and distance are much worse compared to last time.
translations.請注意由 `布院之森` 跟 `一般列車(由布 X)` 不一樣，預約時要注意是不是: Please note that "Yufuin no Mori" is different from the regular train (Yufu X). When making a reservation, be sure to confirm you are booking "Yufuin no Mori."
translations.請輸入在JR Kyushu Rail Pass Online Booking購買: Please enter the name registered when purchasing the JR Kyushu Rail Pass on JR Kyushu Rail Pass Online Booking, or the name printed on the exchange certificate (eMCO, MCO) issued by the travel agency.
translations.豬肉湯飯，豬味很重，湯油但不濃，配飯吃還可以\n: Pork soup with rice has a strong pork flavor. The broth is oily but not thick, and it goes well with rice.
translations.豬頸肉烤盤，夾生菜、泡菜吃不錯，但吃太多會很膩\n: Grilled pork neck on the pan, wrapped in lettuce with kimchi is good, but eating too much can get greasy.
translations.買了一個武雄神社大楠守(1,500 日圓)，尺寸較大＋木盒。\n\n: Bought a Takeo Shrine Large Camphor Amulet (1,500 yen), larger size with a wooden box.
translations.買了一個牛排便當回來吃，很讚；茶酒還好，沒什麼味道。\n\n: Bought a steak bento to eat, it was great; the tea and alcohol were okay, not much flavor.
translations.買了韓國有名的香蕉牛奶喝。\n\n: Bought the famous Korean banana milk to try.
translations.買第二段票到 西面站\n: Buy a second ticket to Seomyeon Station
translations.走右邊參觀臥佛，左邊也有求姻緣、平安、不動明王雕像。\n: Walk to the right to see the Reclining Buddha; on the left, there are statues for seeking love, safety, and Fudo Myo-o.
translations.走石垣道先去唐津神社。(路上人煙稀少、荒涼)\n\n: Walk along Ishigaki Road to Karatsu Shrine. (The road is sparsely populated and desolate)
translations.走進大雄寶殿，外面可以買瓦片寫上自己的願望 (10,000 KRW)。\n\n: Entering the Main Hall, you can buy a tile outside to write your wish on (10,000 KRW).
translations.起床時間晚，大概 8:40 從大分搭乘 JR 特急先前往小倉，預計是在小倉寄放行: Woke up late and took the JR Limited Express from Oita around 8:40 to Kokura. Planned to leave luggage in Kokura before taking a branch line to Mojiko.
translations.趁著結束階段性工作任務到新工作的短暫期間，再去日本走走透透氣；5/30 離職、6: Taking advantage of the short break between finishing a project and starting a new job, I went to Japan to relax; I resigned on 5/30, departed on 6/3, returned on 6/13, and started the new job on 6/24. The timing was perfect, allowing for a longer trip (11 days total) during the job transition. This was a pseudo solo trip, teamed up with James Lin, who joined me on last year's [Tokyo](../9da2c51fa4f2/) trip (Ex-Binance Android Developer, feel free to refer job opportunities to him) ; this is my second visit to Kyushu. [**Last September was my first time in Kyushu**](../d78e0b15a08a/), visiting must-see spots in Fukuoka, Kumamoto, and Nagasaki. This time, I mainly covered places I missed before, so my itinerary differs from James’s, and we split up.
translations.路程稍遠，約需 1 個半小時，韓國公車跟台灣差不多，司機開的蠻猛的；正常是前上後: The trip is a bit long, about 1.5 hours. Korean buses are similar to those in Taiwan, and the drivers tend to drive quite fast. Normally, passengers board from the front and exit from the rear, but some buses allow boarding from the rear and exiting from the front.
translations.車上有 WiFi (不過不太穩)\n: There is WiFi on the bus (but it's not very stable)
translations.車站附近就是 [曳山展示場](https://japantravel.navit: Near the station is the [Float Exhibition Hall](https://japantravel.navitime.com/zh-tw/area/jp/spot/02301-1301440/){:target="_blank"} (it closes after 17:00), so you can only see small models at the station.
translations.車資是我搭過最高的公車車資，730 日圓。\n\n: The fare is the highest bus fare I've ever paid: 730 yen.
translations.輸入你想註冊的電子郵件，點擊「登記」。\n\n: Enter the email you want to register and click "Register."
translations.輸入信用卡資訊支付訂位費用 (成人 1,000 / 兒童 500 日圓一人)。\: Enter credit card information to pay the reservation fee (1,000 yen per adult / 500 yen per child).
translations.輸入周遊券開始使用日。\n\n: Enter the start date of the pass.
translations.轉搭公車到九十九島水族館站下車後約走 5 分鐘就能到九十九島遊覽船遊客中心，就能: After transferring to the bus and getting off at the Kujukushima Aquarium stop, it's about a 5-minute walk to the Kujukushima Sightseeing Boat Visitor Center, where you can buy tickets to board the boat. (Showing your JR Pass grants a discount)
translations.近看很美、很寧靜。\n\n: Up close, it is beautiful and very peaceful.
translations.這季節綠油油的一路上沒特別好看的風景(或由布院之森才有景？)\n: The scenery along the way is lush green this season but nothing particularly striking (or is it only the Yufuin no Mori that offers scenic views?)
translations.這次大比分落後，終場以 9:3 戰敗結束，沒有煙火可以看，但也見識到兩隊的應援活: This time, we lost badly with a final score of 9:3. There were no fireworks, but we witnessed the cheering activities of both teams. (Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks' balloon cheer and Tokyo Yakult Swallows' umbrella dance cheer)
translations.這次搭乘的是 11:00 左邊這艘白色的珍珠皇后號。\n\n: This time we took the white Pearl Queen ship on the left at 11:00.
translations.這次新增七大福中的四尊、迷你啤酒、高千穗(狗)戌年御守。\n\n: This time, added four of the Seven Lucky Gods statues, mini beer, and Takachiho (dog) Year of the Dog amulets.
translations.這次華航飛釜山是在第一航廈。\n\n: This time, China Airlines flew to Busan from Terminal 1.
translations.這次點瘦肉套餐 200g 3,200 日圓，狂嗑了兩碗白飯(飯湯免費續)。\n\: This time I ordered the lean meat set, 200g for 3,200 yen, and devoured two bowls of white rice (rice soup refills are free).
translations.這班華航飛釜山的是 737–800 中型飛機，沒有娛樂螢幕，Bye Taiwan: This China Airlines flight to Busan uses a 737–800 medium-sized aircraft with no entertainment screens. Bye Taiwan!
translations.這邊有一個和布刈神社鳥居，後面山上有 和布刈神社、和布刈神社展望台。\n\n: Here is the Wakamatsu Shrine torii gate, and on the mountain behind it are Wakamatsu Shrine and the Wakamatsu Shrine Observation Deck.
translations.這邊空間比較大、能體驗的項目較多，商店也有賣一些吃的，可以在此休憩。\n\n: This area is more spacious with more activities to experience. Some shops also sell snacks, making it a good place to rest.
translations.通鋪經濟艙 11 點就會統一熄燈，看完出港差不多就可以回來躺平了。\n\n: The economy dormitory lights go out at 11 PM. After watching the departure, you can head back and lie down.
translations.逛完前往博多站。\n\n: After shopping, head to Hakata Station.
translations.進入 KLOOK 查看 JR Pass 憑證，複製貼上以下憑證號。\n\n: Go to KLOOK to view the JR Pass voucher, then copy and paste the following voucher number.
translations.進入釜山站大廳 (2樓)，找到 10 號出口，一路走天橋就能到 釜山港國際航運總: Enter the Busan Station lobby (2nd floor), find Exit 10, and walk along the skybridge to Busan Port International Terminal (about a 15-minute walk).
translations.進門樓之後就是蓬萊湯泡湯的，另一邊還有溫泉住宿鷺乃湯。\n\n: After entering the gate is the Horai Bath for soaking, and on the other side is the hot spring accommodation, Saginoyu.
translations.過唐戶市場就是碼頭可以坐渡船直接回門司港，到對面商店自動購票機買票即可；有時間還: Passing Karato Market leads to the pier where you can take a ferry directly back to Mojiko. Just buy a ticket at the automatic ticket machine in the shops across the pier. If you have time, you can also visit Ganryu Island (the famous duel site!).
translations.還好飯店有 100V 台灣的插座/USB 插座，不需要轉接頭就能使用。\n: Fortunately, the hotel has 100V Taiwanese power outlets/USB ports, so no adapter is needed.
translations.金鱗湖非常乾淨清澈，湖邊有許多楓葉(尚未變色)。\n\n: Kinrinko Lake is very clean and clear, with many maple trees by the shore (not yet changed color).
translations.釜山港國際航運總站(碼頭)裡面空蕩蕩，沒什麼人，因為每日航班也很少；除了往福岡博: Busan Port International Terminal (pier) is quite empty inside, with few people, as daily sailings are limited; besides trips to Fukuoka Hakata, there are also cruises to Shimonoseki, Tsushima Island, Osaka, Kumamoto, and others.
translations.長崎：中華街、哥巴拉園、稻佐山夜景、原爆資料館、和平公園\n: Nagasaki: Chinatown, Glover Garden, Mount Inasa Night View, Atomic Bomb Museum, Peace Park
translations.門司港出站後直接往左手邊(不用走出建築)，就是自助的 Coin Lockers，: After exiting Mojiko Station, turn directly to the left (no need to leave the building) to find the self-service Coin Lockers. There were quite a few people in Mojiko this time, and all lockers were full; however, fortunately, the manned luggage storage counter had started operating, allowing me to store my luggage successfully (**but the manned counter only operates until 8 PM!** ⚠️).
translations.閱讀並同意條款，點擊「前往下一頁」\n\n: Read and agree to the terms, then click "Go to Next Page"
translations.雖然大件行李搭公車不方便，不過因為這是發車站，所以一定有位子，大多數人也都帶行李: Although carrying large luggage on the bus is inconvenient, since this is the departure station, there are always seats available. Most people also carry luggage, so it's less awkward.
translations.需拖鞋，整體很像是專門接待團體觀光客的日式餐廳，但我也是第一次體驗日式餐廳。\n: Slippers are required. Overall, it feels like a Japanese restaurant mainly catering to tour groups, but this was my first time experiencing a Japanese-style restaurant.
translations.韓國可以只買 tmoney 交通卡，不需 Wowpass\n: In Korea, you can just buy a Tmoney transportation card without needing a Wowpass.
translations.韓國白天溫度大約 20–25 度，晚上可能低於 20 度；有點像台灣的秋天季節。: The daytime temperature in Korea is around 20–25°C, and it may drop below 20°C at night; it's somewhat like autumn in Taiwan.
translations.韓國釜山搭乘新山茶花號郵輪入境日本博多，遊歷由布院、大分、福岡、下關、絲島、佐世: From Busan, South Korea, take the New Camellia cruise ship to enter Hakata, Japan, and travel through Yufuin, Oita, Fukuoka, Shimonoseki, Itoshima, and Sasebo; a total of 11 days.
translations.韓幣只能臨櫃換\n: Korean won can only be exchanged at the counter.
translations.頂呱呱炸雞有醃過，很好吃，可惜機場這家不供應呱呱包；另外 **發現這邊充電座都被: Ding Gua Gua fried chicken is marinated and very tasty, but unfortunately, this airport location does not offer the Gua Gua bun; additionally, **I found that all charging stations here have been removed, leaving only the shells, so charging is not possible**.
translations.飯店大廳就有 wowpass 機器，掃描護照按照指示跑完流程，機器就會吐出 wo: The hotel lobby has a wowpass machine. Scan your passport and follow the instructions to complete the process, and the machine will issue a wowpass+tmoney combo card.
translations.餐點整體普通偏下，可能是因為團體人多，大部分都冷掉、肉質吃起來也普普。\n\n: The overall meal was mediocre to below average, possibly due to the large group. Most dishes were cold, and the meat quality was just so-so.
translations.高千穗因為從福岡去交通極其困難，因此直接報名 [**KKDAY 高千穗一日遊**: Takachiho is very difficult to reach from Fukuoka, so I directly booked the [**KKDAY Takachiho One-Day Tour**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/32511-kyushu-chinese-guided-day-tour-from-fukuoka-takachiho-gorge-kamishikimi-kumanoimasu-shrine-amanoiwato-shrine?cid=19365&ud1=cb65fd5ab770){:target="_blank"}, which includes private transport, lunch, and a Chinese-speaking guide. The price was NT$2,272 per person.
translations.高千穗峽谷划船需要提早預訂\n: Booking ahead is required for boating at Takachiho Gorge
translations.高千穗神社整個被神木包圍著，整體透露著寧靜、清新。\n\n: Takachiho Shrine is completely surrounded by sacred trees, giving off a peaceful and refreshing atmosphere.
translations.鬼山地獄的水沸騰的更激烈，不斷地往外奔騰。\n\n: The water at Oniyama Hell boils more violently, continuously surging outward.
translations.點心冰淇淋、宵夜是超商熱狗。\n\n: Snack ice cream, and a convenience store hot dog for a late-night snack.
translations.點心是草莓冰沙、宵夜是超商炸雞、秋雅(好甜)。\n\n: Snacks were strawberry slushies, and late-night meals were convenience store fried chicken. Qiuyah (so sweet).
translations.龍卷地獄是間歇噴發的噴泉，約 30–40 分鐘噴發一次，一次大約會持續 6–10: Tatsumaki Jigoku is an intermittent geyser that erupts every 30–40 minutes, with each eruption lasting about 6–10 minutes. You can ask the staff at Tatsumaki (in our case, the staff proactively informed and assisted us). If it’s about to erupt, you can wait and watch; if not, you can visit Chinoike Jigoku first.
